text: I feel a curious tension between the stillness and the sense of purpose here. The quiet, almost clinical hallway transitions sharply into a corridor of innovation and creativity. The fire extinguisher and emergency signs remind me of the structures that keep us safe, just as the research and development wall reminds me of how we constantly push boundaries. I feel both grounded by the orderliness of the environment and inspired by the potential of human ingenuity displayed on the exhibit walls.
